items.name: codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

descriptions.zh: Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode 和 Hermes Agent 的预索引代码知识图 — 更少的令牌、更少的工具调用、100% 本地化
descriptions.en: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

items.name: RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

descriptions.zh: π RuView 将商用 WiFi 信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测和存在检测 - 所有这些都无需视频像素。
descriptions.en: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

items.name: ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

descriptions.zh: 学习它。建造它。寄给别人。
descriptions.en: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

descriptions.zh: 用于编码代理的 Chrome DevTools
